trigger: 30-minute MVP builder run: deepen protected evidence access tests by proving misc-admin cannot download student evidence and denied attempts are audited with role-scope metadata.
scope: Add a focused integration test ensuring `misc_admin` sessions cannot access `/api/evidence/:id/download`, that Drive fetch is not called on denied access, and that audit metadata captures role scopes; update requirement catalog/memory/run log with the new evidence.
changes: Updated tests/evidence-drive-file.integration.test.mjs to assert misc-admin evidence download is denied (403), no Drive fetch occurs, and the denial is audited with role-scope metadata.
Updated docs/mvp-requirements-catalog.md to reflect misc-admin denial coverage for evidence downloads under MVP-014.
Updated docs/automation-memory.md and docs/progress/run-log.md to record the new MVP-014 evidence plus this structured run manifest.
known_limits: This run improves proof of denied-access behavior; it does not add new evidence endpoints or expand Google Drive credential verification in Cloudflare.
next_actions: Add misc-admin denial coverage for other protected endpoints (exports, announcements admin routes) to harden the narrow misc-admin posture across the app.
